untranslatable_reason: The Johansen cointegration test is a multivariate statistical test that cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators and the allowed operators (>, <, >=, <=, ==, crosses_above, crosses_below, is). The signal requires: (1) vector autoregressive (VAR) model estimation, (2) eigenvalue decomposition of the covariance matrix, (3) likelihood ratio test statistic comparison against critical values from non-standard distributions. This requires custom statistical computation outside the scope of the allowed indicator set. The 'is' operator with custom stateful conditions (johansen_cointegrated_with_spy_1pct) would require a bespoke backtest engine extension.
translation_notes: Signal requires implementation of Johansen cointegration test with lookback_period of 250+ trading days, comparing lr1 test statistic against 1% critical value cvt. Equal-weight rebalancing across all qualifying stocks. Exit condition marked AUTHOR_SILENT — represented as reversal when cointegration breaks. This cannot be reduced to standard technical indicators.
